description.value: Aura strong abjuration; CL 12th; Slot body; Price 36,000 gp; Weight 5 lbs. If the wearer is a gunslinger or has the Amateur Gunslinger feat, she begins each day with 1 additional grit point. This extra point does not increase her maximum grit total.
